title: Use of English - Test 1
explanation:
Use of English - C1 Test 1

Mixed advanced grammar and vocabulary review.

questions.text: So complex [*was|is|were] the issue that experts were consulted.
It [*would appear|must appear definitely|appears without doubt] that costs are rising.
[*What|That|Which] the report challenges is the official narrative.
The findings are [*consistent with|angry with|bored with] previous studies.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The ambassador acted as a diplomatic ____.  | *envoy | envy | envoying
The study draws attention ____ gaps in the data. | *to | for | at
DNA ____ has become much faster. | *sequencing | sequence | sequenced
[*Having been warned|Warning|To warn] repeatedly, he ignored the advice.
The jury is [*bound to|never going to|forbidden to] reach a verdict soon.
[*Had|If had] we known, we would have acted differently.
The former policy focused on tax; [*the latter|the ladder|the weather] on spending.
